feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Make Putaway quantity Field mandatory in Inbound delivery
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We have a requirement of making "Putaway quantity" field mandatory in Inbound delivery.

Kindly provide possible way to make the field mandatory in the SAP S/4HANA Public cloud.

Thanks.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Manage Preferred Supplier List
entry.content: What can the users use instead of Manage Preferred Supplier list as no longer available in 2408?

entry.title: S4HC: How to output purchase order PDF and CSV (or XML) simultaneously?
entry.content:
Hi

I understand that outputting CSV files in S/4 HANA Public Cloud is difficult.
When attempting to output a PDF, an XML file is generated in the background and then converted to PDF.

Question 1: Is there a location where the XML file is stored in the background? Or is the XML file deleted as a cache file during PDF generation?

Question 2: If we cannot access the XML file as mentioned above, I'm considering connecting the purchase order number with BTP through email sending settings, accessing the purchase order data on the BTP side, and creating a CSV file. Are there any other good alternative solutions?

entry.title: VAT Report Previews
entry.content:
Hi,

We are currently implementing SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition in 4 countries in the EU (Czechia, Slovakia, Poland and Hungary). We have purchased the license for Document and Report Compliance cloud edition (8008260), but up to now have not activated the license for Document and Reporting Compliance for S/4HANA (8013658).

5XU (Document and Reporting Compliance) has always been a scope item in the project, already listed in the DDA. But now, at the end of the Explore phase, it seems like 5XU specifically requires the license for DRC for S/4HANA (8013658) if we want to activate it. Ultimately it all boils down to the need for VAT Report previews, which is essential for us. Without the additional license, it seems like we cannot preview VAT reports.

My main question is if there is any way for VAT Reports to be previewed without requiring the DRC for S/4HANA (8013658) license, or scope item 5XU?

Also, where can I find accurate information about what DRC licenses are required for 5XU?

Thanks a lot

entry.title: CONDITION MWBO EXCLUSION AGAINST SPECIFIC VAT CODE
entry.content:
Is it possible to manage this case using the standard customizing or we can manage it only with a custom routine to be inserted on BOLL condition?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Want to restrict the release button option in Manage Documented Credit Decisions
entry.content:
How to to restrict the release button option in  Manage Documented Credit Decisions so that user cannot release.

entry.title: Credit Management Reporting app is disappear event there is a business catalog assigned.
entry.content:
Credit Management Reporting app is disappeared event I've assigned the business catalog "SAP_FIN_BC_CR_ADV_ANALY_PC" to the business role "ALLBR_CREDIT_CONTROLLER". Please kindly help to check why it's still disappeared.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Automatically block Concur expense posting for every WBS
entry.content:
Hello,

 

When creating a WBS, we can manually block posting from Concur Expenses.

Is there an option to block this automatically for every WBS created?

Thank You

entry.title: Problem of copying text from service order to billing document item level texts
entry.content: We encountered an issue when displaying the invoice form from a service order. The problem is as follows: after making a text note at the item and header level of the service order, this note (message) cannot be transferred to the invoice. Since it doesn’t carry over, we are unable to display it on the invoice form. Has anyone faced a similar issue, and what would you suggest as a solution? Thank you.

entry.title: Experience with Deleting Company Codes Before Go-Live
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I am reaching out to see if anyone in this community has experience with the deletion of company codes in SAP public Cloud before the Go-Live phase. Currently, we only have our Customizing and Test systems in place, and we are considering this action to streamline our setup.

Has anyone successfully deleted company codes in a similar scenario? If so, I would greatly appreciate any insights, best practices, or potential pitfalls to be aware of during this process. Do we need to open an Incident with SAP for the deletion?

Thank you in advance for your assistance and shared experiences.

entry.title: Precondition is not working in Maintain validation and Substitution rules app when data comes API
entry.content:
Maintain validation and substitution rules app with Precondition working in Manual both in Starter and Customizing System but when we trigger data from API precondition is not working. 

Note: Without precondition this rule working fine from API as well . Is there any way to handle the precondition when data comes from API?

entry.title: India TCS Form 27EQ - Remmitance Challan Issue
entry.content:
Hello,

We've posted a customer invoice with the TCS withholding tax codes maintained in the master data. But when we are trying to create the "Remittance Challan - TCS (Customers)", we are getting an error message the "No unpaid tax line exists for the given selection criteria" after providing the necessary details in the selection screen. The Business place and section codes have been given at the time of invoicing, the withholding is also getting calculated for customer invoices but the documents are not getting picked up at the time of "Remmitance".

Note,

All the configurations related to TCS and Extended withholding tax has been configured in the "Sandbox" system. The Business Place is also maintained and is assigned to the section codes. 

Can anyone please help us in resolving this issue. 

Thanks

entry.title: Adding / changing printer for Manage Physical Inventory Documents app
entry.content:
With release 2408 upgrade S/4HANA deleted Print Physical Inventory Document app replacing it with Manage Physical Inventory Documents app, how to we assign same out queue/printer as deleted app to new app.

I tried using Output Parameter Determination app, but with my very limited SAP knowledge I am not able to find out how to assign printer or printq to Manage Physical Inventory Documents app.

Thanks in advance for your help

Ashraf

S/4HANA Public Cloud

entry.title: Unable to assign Warehouse with Storage location and plant
entry.content:
Hi,

We have TDD system, and we are working with SAP S4 Hana Public Cloud Embedded Warehouse Management, created Cloud Warehouse and Warehouse number but I am not getting any option for warehouse and storage location assignment. 

Kindly suggest.

Thanks,

Sanjay

entry.title: Master Data Integration how to connect a QAS Tenant?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I’m in charge of setting up the QAS subaccount for our implementation project (S/4HANA Public Cloud). We are configuring Master Data Integration (BTP Service) in the QAS subaccount. According to the documentation, Tenant == Subaccount. We were able to connect S4 to MDI using the DEV instance for basic testing, but now that we have created the new subaccount for QAS, we have subscribed to MDO and set up the service instances for each app we need to integrate. The problem is that we are not able to reach the new MDI with the service key—we get a 401 error. My question is: How can we identify which MDI tenant we are connecting to? What I see in all the service keys is the same URI: https://one-mds.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com, no matter which subaccount I’m using. Can an MDI expert help me? Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Custom ABAP CDS Views in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Three parts to this question

1. Can I extend a standard ABAP CDS and create a custom ABAP CDS view on top of it and expose it as OData Service (Consumption view) so it can be consumed in SAP SAC?

2. Can I create a fully customizable CDS view all the way (Basic, Composite and Consumption views) and expose it as OData Service for SAP SAC?

3. To expose as OData Service is there a specific Fiori Tile similar to /IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE exist in SAP Public Cloud?

Thank you,

Arthur

entry.title: Brazil Tax Reform - NF-e Technical Note 2024.002 and DF-e Technical Note 2024.001
entry.content:
Customer would like to know when SAP intends to provide more technical details about Brazil Tax Reform. According to the customer, Brazil Government has issued Technical Notes and customer needs to understand the impacts in the system.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to enable BOM material on sales order item and print it?
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

Our client would like to know how to enable BOM material on the sales order item level and the same on the print layout.

Kindly advise.
Thanks!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to Create And Add Custom Fields to SAP S/4HANA Cloud OData API Entities
entry.content:
Hi All, 

How to Create And Add Custom Fields to SAP S/4HANA Cloud OData API Entities?

API: Condition Record for Pricing in Sales
  • Sales: Pricing Communication Head (SD_PRICECOMHEAD)
  • Sales: Pricing Communication Item (SD_PRICECOMITEM)

    I use "Custom Fields"  to create and publish a new custom filed in SD_PRICECOMITEM, and use "Adapt UI" to add it in "Manage Price - Sales" .

    When I maintain this field and save this step in UI, I couldn't see any value in custom filed on  "API_SLSPRICINGCONDITIONRECORD_SRV".

     

     What's the next step I should do?

    I don't know how to map this custom field to the correct target table if I need to add a bapi or other method.

     

     

     

     

    Thanks,

    Eric

entry.title: SAP Ariba Integration with S/4HANA Public Cloud for Business Partner replication using SOAP API's
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

we are integrated from Ariba to S/4 HANA Public Cloud using SOAP APIs using Managed Gateways Passthrough integration via BTP Master Data Integration.

  • We are created Instances services as Master Data Integration and Subscription services as Master Data Integration (Orchestration).
  • We have use this JSON below to create the service instance.

 

{
    "application": "s4",
    "businessSystemId": "<businessSystemId>", //Business System ID is SAP S/4HANA Cloud system this value is can be found under Communication systems tile and then filter by Own System.
    "enableTenantDeletion": false,
    "globalTenantId": "<subaccount Id under Service Key>",
    "logSys": "<Same logsys configure in S4PC>",
    "writePermissions": [
        {
            "entityType": "sap.odm.businesspartner.BusinessPartner"
        },
        {
            "entityType": "sap.odm.businesspartner.BusinessPartnerRelationship"
        }
    ],
    "xs-security": {
        "xsappname": "<a unique v4 UUID can be used>",
        "authorities": [
            "$XSMASTERAPPNAME.BPCommonRead",
            "$XSMASTERAPPNAME.BPSensitiveDataRead"
        ]
    }
}

 

  • Created new project in managed gateway to connection from Managed Gateway to MDI (BTP). We are encountering a 404 error while testing the connection. 

    Configure in CIG inbound URL is https://<one-mds.cfapps.<region>.hana.ondemand.com>/businesspartner/v0/soap/BusinessPartnerBulkReplicateRequestIn?tenantId=<identityzone>

    For basic authentication, specify the following:
    User: Value of clientid from the Service key
    Password: Value of clientsecret from the Service key
  • While triggering business partner replication from S4PC its successfully reaching BTP but not in Ariba (Manage Gateway).
  • How to send master data from MDI to Ariba solution?
  • Can you please share configuration guide for this?

Could you please help me on this Integration connection.

Below are the links we referenced and created the MDI integration.

About Supplier Data Integration with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Using SAP Master Data Integration | SAP Help Portal

Configuring SOAP Outbound Destinations to the SAP Integration Suite, managed gateway for spend management and SAP Business Network in SAP Master Data Integration | SAP Help Portal

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/configuring-sap-master-data-integration-service-for-business-partner/ba-p/13543017

Thanks & Regards,

Thouheed
